programs.title: The World Today
programs.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programs.title: Africa Live
programs.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN's Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live.

programs.title: Asia Today
programs.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region's top stories as they happen.

programs.title: Dialogue
programs.desc: It is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN.

programs.title: China 24
programs.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China.
